title: access.grants Facet
description: Observed host-access grants (charter §1.2: a projection of actual OS access state; §4.2 'additive claims'). An array of the bare {subject, kind, scope} tuples enforceable on the host — local admins, sudoers rules, authorized_keys, accounts. `subject` is a host-local account, deliberately NOT the platform Principal Named Kind (§2). Projected by the access collector gather Run, demanded by the shipping Intent/Access Baselines (§1.1). A compiled Baseline ensures-contains the desired grant tuple (additive); a desired grant absent is drift, and an unmanaged tuple present is visible for recertification. Per-element provenance (which Intent/Assignment contributed a grant, since when) lives on the desired side in Git (§1.2) and is joined in the recertification report — the observed tuple is bare so drift matching is exact.
